final:
// // This is a 9-bit binary counter with asynchronous reset and disable functionality
module binary_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [7:0] count);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 8'b00000000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end
endmodule
